## Summary
- What does this change do and why?

## Changes
- Bullet list of notable updates (components, routes, config)

## Screenshots / Videos
- If UI changed, include before/after or a short clip

## Test Plan
- Commands run: `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`
- Manual checks performed (routes, forms, APIs)

## Linked Issues
- Closes #<id>

## Checklist
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README/AGENTS or relevant docs)
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots
